style_vocabulary: editorial × e-ink — documentary or grayscale-infographic, warm restraint, no stock gloss
policy: TEXT PROMPTS ONLY. No image model is called. The deck ships CSS placeholder blocks; these prompts are what a user would hand to an image model later to fill these exact slots.

prompts.prompt: Editorial cover image, electronic-ink aesthetic: a single quiet object — an old mechanical metronome at rest — on warm off-white paper, soft raking light, generous negative space on the right for the title. Muted, almost monochrome, one faint ink-blue cast. Documentary, unstyled, no gloss.
prompts.negative: no logos, no brands, no UI screenshots, no stock-photo sheen, no neon, no 3D render
prompts.placeholder: HERO · metronome at rest, warm paper, space for title

prompts.prompt: Grayscale editorial infographic: two side-by-side gauges, one labelled 'machine' pinned high, one labelled 'attention' left blank/un-instrumented. E-ink texture, thin hairline rules, serif numerals. Restrained, paper background.
prompts.negative: no color fills beyond a single ink accent, no drop shadows, no glossy 3D dials

prompts.prompt: Documentary still, e-ink palette: three small paper arrows on a desk all pointing away from a central worn object, suggesting forces pulling outward. Warm paper, soft shadow, lots of air. Quiet and analog.
prompts.negative: no text baked into the image, no brand marks, no vivid saturation
prompts.placeholder: LEAD · three arrows pulling away from the center

prompts.prompt: Editorial close-up, grayscale with one ink accent: a stopwatch whose dial is relabelled 'time-to-out-of-the-way', resting on warm paper. Tactile, documentary, restrained.
prompts.negative: no real brand stopwatch, no glossy product render, no rainbow color

prompts.prompt: Closing editorial image, e-ink: an empty, calm desk with a single closed notebook in soft warm light, wide negative space for one centered question. Minimal, contemplative, paper texture.
prompts.negative: no people, no logos, no busy props, no high-key glossy lighting
prompts.placeholder: HERO · calm empty desk, space for the closing question

ratio_note: Every slot's aspect ratio matches the slot defined in select_layouts (16:9 heroes, 4:3 side figures) — standardized ratios per Step 3.2 图片比例规范; no raw source ratios.
source: prompts per op7418/guizang-ppt-skill references/image-prompts.md (GPT-M 2.0 配图提示词: 通用规则 / 比例选择 / Style-A 电子杂志 × 电子墨水 types) + SKILL.md 可选配图 (this branch is optional and, here, prompts-only).
